title: ABUSE INTERVENTION GROUPS - 211info
text: ALLIES IN CHANGE OREGON CITY ABERNETHY ABUSE INTERVENTION GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers individual, couples, and group counseling. Helps people with a wide variety of issues including those dealing with depression, stress, anxiety, building better connections, communication and successful relationships with others, dealing with significant changes and transitions in life related to relationships, work, family, health, and other issues. Also has a sub-specialty in domestic violence counseling for abusers and anger management. 999 Abernethy Road Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-7pm, Friday 9am-5pm. Appointments available outside of office hours by request. Email (503) 297-7979 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 297-7979 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Sliding scale based on income available for all services and partial scholarships available for groups DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-9pm Services: Anger Management Conjoint Counseling Domestic Violence Intervention Programs Group Counseling Individual Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
